required_sections: ## 多智能体生产级系统的核心挑战
## 控制平面与运行时会话

checks.name: technical_depth
checks.description: covers concrete architectural choices, trade-offs, and at least one MAS production failure mode the blog explicitly discusses

checks.name: source_grounding
checks.description: claims that need citation are backed by explicit URL references in the same paragraph or immediately adjacent sentence; core sections include inline URLs near the claims, not only a final bibliography; cites at least 5 distinct external sources overall

checks.name: non_mechanical_expression
checks.description: prose reads as written by a senior engineer, not as a list of bullet templates; transitions between sections feel natural in Chinese
